questions.question: How do you enable route-level code splitting in Vue Router?
options: Adding splitChunks: true to the route configuration
Using () => import('./views/Page.vue') as the component definition
Setting lazy: true on the route object
Wrapping the component in defineAsyncComponent in the router

questions.question: What does the delay option in defineAsyncComponent do?
options: Delays the initial component load by a set number of milliseconds
Prevents showing the loading component for fast loads to avoid a flash
Sets the debounce time before retrying a failed load
Controls how long the component stays cached before reloading

questions.question: How do you group multiple routes into the same chunk in Vite (not Webpack)?
options: Setting chunkName in the route definition object
Using manualChunks in the Vite Rollup output config
Adding a chunkGroup field to the Vite plugin configuration
